name: sca_burst
description: SCA burst — simulates N agents performing ModuleFull (first sync or recovery) simultaneously.
notes: Represents: 200 agents performing SCA FULL sync simultaneously (e.g., after manager restart).
Each agent sends 600 checks ≈ a single CIS benchmark policy (300-600 checks/policy).
Total DataValue messages: 200 x 600 = 120,000 enqueued in WorkersQueue.
- WorkersQueue: 120k x ~4 KB = ~480 MB if workers can't keep up.
- RocksDB: 120k keys x 4 KB ≈ 480 MB on disk if sessions complete slowly.
Proxies: RSS ramp during send window, disk growth in queue/inventory_sync.
Compare with sca_baseline: if RSS grows 5-10x baseline, WorkersQueue is the bottleneck.
